name: Activation Group Holdings Limited
summary: Activation Group Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, operates as an integrated marketing solutions provider in the People's Republic of China. The company offers integrated marketing solutions, including experiential marketing, digital and brand communication, and public relations services. It also provides sports intellectual property development services; manages and operates sport events; and invests in entertainment projects. The company was founded in 2013 and is headquartered in Shanghai, the People's Republic of China.
